English | Az…ôrbaycanca

Orta LΟΦΡü…ôt

Orta LΟΦΡü…ôt

Orta s…ôviyy…ô ΟΦΟßΟΦn 180 …ôh…ômiyy…ôtli sΟΕzΟΦ m…ônims…ôyin! Bu lΟΦΡü…ôt akademik v…ô pe≈ü…ôkar mΟΦhitl…ôrd…ô tez-tez istifad…ô olunan sΟΕzl…ôrd…ôn ibar…ôtdir.

Orta S…ôviyy…ô HaqqΡ±nda

Bu orta s…ôviyy…ô lΟΦΡü…ôt kolleksiyasΡ± …ôsas lΟΦΡü…ôti m…ônims…ômi≈ü v…ô daha mΟΦr…ôkk…ôb sΟΕzl…ôr ΟΕyr…ônm…ôk ist…ôy…ôn ≈üagirdl…ôr ΟΦΟßΟΦn t…ôrtib edilmi≈üdir. H…ôr s…ôhif…ôd…ô 12 sΟΕz var v…ô a≈üaΡüΡ±dakΡ±lar daxildir:

  • D…ôqiq t…ôl…ôffΟΦz - Beyn…ôlxalq Fonetik Τèlifba (IPA) gΟΕst…ôril…ôrk…ôn
  • Nitq hiss…ôsinin mΟΦ…ôyy…ônl…ô≈üdirilm…ôsi - ΡΑsim, fel, sif…ôt v…ô s.
  • DetallΡ± t…ôrifl…ôr - SΟΕz m…ônasΡ±nΡ±n tam ba≈üa dΟΦ≈üΟΦlm…ôsi ΟΦΟßΟΦn
  • Kontekst misallarΡ± - Real istifad…ô v…ôziyy…ôtl…ôrind…ô
  • Sinoniml…ôrin siyahΡ±sΡ± - M…ônaca yaxΡ±n sΟΕzl…ôr

Ο•yr…ônm…ô Yana≈ümasΡ±

Bu orta s…ôviyy…ô sΟΕzl…ôri m…ônims…ôm…ôk ΟΦΟßΟΦn:

  1. M…ôna f…ôrql…ôrini ΟΕyr…ônin - Sinoniml…ôrl…ô mΟΦqayis…ô ed…ôr…ôk
  2. Formal kontekstd…ô istifad…ô edin - YazΡ±lΡ± i≈ül…ôrd…ô t…ôtbiq edin
  3. Tematik qruplamalara diqq…ôt edin - Ox≈üar mΟΕvzulu sΟΕzl…ôri birlikd…ô ΟΕyr…ônin
  4. Pe≈ü…ôkar sΟΕhb…ôtl…ôrd…ô i≈ül…ôdin - R…ôsmi mΟΦhitl…ôrd…ô istifad…ô edin
  5. M…ôtn oxumaΡüΡ± artΡ±rΡ±n - Bu sΟΕzl…ôri …ôsl m…ôtinl…ôrd…ô axtarΡ±n

LΟΦΡü…ôt S…ôhif…ôl…ôri

S…ôhif…ô 1

Acquire, Approach, Authority, Benefit, Capacity, Certainly, Community, Complex, Concept, Consequence, Consider, Context

S…ôhif…ô 2

Culture, Develop, Economy, Element, Environment, Establish, Event, Evidence, Factor, Feature, Focus, Function

S…ôhif…ô 3

Generate, Government, Impact, Implement, Individual, Industry, Information, Institution, Invest, Issue, Knowledge, Language

S…ôhif…ô 4

Particular, Perspective, Phenomenon, Potential, Preliminary, Primarily, Procedure, Proportion, Pursue, Remarkable, Reluctant, Significant

S…ôhif…ô 5

Subsequent, Substitute, Sufficient, Technique, Temporary, Transition, Ultimate, Undertake, Valid, Vary, Version, Volume

S…ôhif…ô 6

Acknowledge, Analyze, Approximately, Assume, Available, Benefit, Calculate, Challenge, Communicate, Community, Compare, Complete

S…ôhif…ô 7

Complex, Concept, Conduct, Conference, Confidence, Confirm, Consider, Construct, Contain, Context, Continue, Contribute

S…ôhif…ô 8

Create, Culture, Decision, Define, Demand, Describe, Design, Develop, Difference, Discuss, Distribute, Document

S…ôhif…ô 9

Economy, Education, Effective, Element, Emergency, Emphasis, Employment, Environment, Equipment, Especially, Event, Evidence

S…ôhif…ô 10

Example, Experience, Explain, Express, Factor, Feature, Finance, Focus, Function, Future, Global, Government

S…ôhif…ô 11

History, Identity, Importance, Include, Increase, Individual, Industry, Information, Institution, Involve, Issue, Knowledge

S…ôhif…ô 12

Language, Legal, Level, Location, Management, Material, Medical, Method, Model, Natural, Network, Normal

S…ôhif…ô 13

Object, Opportunity, Organization, Original, Pattern, Performance, Period, Personal, Physical, Policy, Popular, Position

S…ôhif…ô 14

Practice, Present, Previous, Primary, Process, Product, Professional, Project, Provide, Public, Quality, Question

S…ôhif…ô 15

Range, Reason, Receive, Relationship, Research, Resource, Respond, Responsibility, Result, Society, Structure, System

Tez Naviqasiya

  • S…ôyah…ôtiniz…ô Ba≈ülayΡ±n: S…ôhif…ô 1 il…ô ba≈ülayΡ±n
  • Ο•yr…ônm…ôy…ô Davam Edin: S…ôhif…ôl…ôr arasΡ±nda …ôvv…ôlki/nΟΕvb…ôti dΟΦym…ôl…ôrind…ôn istifad…ô edin
  • ΡΑr…ôlil…ôyi≈üi ΡΑzl…ôyin: Bu icmalΡ±na qayΡ±dΡ±b inki≈üafΡ±nΡ±zΡ± gΟΕrΟΦn

Ο•yr…ônm…ôni Τèlaq…ôl…ôndirin

ΡΑr…ôlil…ômi≈ü T…ôcrΟΦb…ô ΟΦΟßΟΦn Qrammatika MΟΕvzularΡ±

  • Passiv S…ôs - MΟΦr…ôkk…ôb lΟΦΡü…ôti passiv qurulu≈ülarda istifad…ô edin
  • Modal Feill…ôr - ΡΑr…ôlil…ômi≈ü lΟΦΡü…ôtl…ô r…ôy v…ô imkanlarΡ± ifad…ô edin
  • DolayΡ± Nitq - Akademik lΟΦΡü…ôti dolayΡ± ifad…ôl…ôrd…ô t…ôtbiq edin

LΟΦΡü…ôtinizi SΡ±nayan Hekay…ôl…ôr

  • ΡΑ≈ü MΟΦsahib…ôsi - Kontekstd…ô pe≈ü…ôkar lΟΦΡü…ôt
  • Bazarda Bir GΟΦn - M…ôd…ôni v…ô biznes lΟΦΡü…ôti
  • ΡΑtirilmi≈ü AΟßar - Problem h…ôlli lΟΦΡü…ôti

Orta s…ôviyy…ô ΡΑngilis lΟΦΡü…ôtin…ô yiy…ôl…ônm…ôy…ô hazΡ±rsΡ±nΡ±z? S…ôhif…ô 1 il…ô ba≈ülayΡ±n v…ô 15 s…ôhif…ônin hamΡ±sΡ±nΡ± tamamlayaraq academic v…ô pe≈ü…ôkar kommunikasiya bacarΡ±qlarΡ±nΡ±zΡ± artΡ±rΡ±n!

ΡΑngilis dili ΟΕyr…ôn

A comprehensive multilingual blog for English language learners with vocabulary, grammar lessons, interactive exercises, and educational stories organized by difficulty levels.
